userMessage: Set CH1 200mV DC 50ohm VDD_CORE, CH2 500mV DC 50ohm VDD_IO, CH3 1V DC 50ohm VDD_PHY, CH4 2V DC 1Mohm PGOOD signal. Set trigger on CH4 rising edge 1V normal mode. Single sequence acquisition record length 10 million samples. Add measurements: delay from CH4 rising to CH1 crossing 100mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH2 crossing 250mV, delay from CH4 rising to CH3 crossing 500mV. Add pk2pk and mean on CH1 CH2 CH3. Query all delay and measurement results saving to named variables. Save all 4 channels as binary files. Take screenshot.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate JSON for this request.

Verified enough for:
- channel scale / coupling / termination / label
- trigger edge source / slope / level / normal mode
- record length
- single-sequence acquisition
- add basic measurements
- query measurement current-acq mean
- save waveform files
- save screenshot

But exact MCP verification is still insufficient for the critical delay-measurement setup details needed here:
- assigning two distinct delay sources for each delay measurement
- setting the delay crossing/reference thresholds per measurement at 100 mV, 250 mV, and 500 mV
- materializing the final canonical SCPI strings for those measurement commands

Because your policy says to fail closed rather than guess, I’m stopping here instead of returning non-authoritative JSON.

If you want, next turn I can build it immediately once those exact MCP records are available for:
- the dual-source delay measurement commands
- the per-measurement absolute reference-level commands/materializations
